body: ## Summary Agent responds to multiple previous messages instead of only the most recent one, causing repetitive answers to already-addressed questions. ## Steps to reproduce 1. Start a conversation in Discord or Telegram DM with the agent (might happen with other providers too, not tested). 2. Have an extended conversation (e.g. 10+ messages back and forth) 3. Ask a question and get an answer 4. Ask a follow-up question 5. Agent often re-answers the previous question along with the new one ## Expected behavior Agent should only respond to the most recent message, using previous messages purely as context. ## Actual behavior Agent frequently responds to multiple previous messages in a single response, repeating information already provided. This happens more reliably after ~10-15 message exchanges, though the exact trigger is unclear (may be related to message count, context window, or tool usage). Example behavior: ``` [19:47] User: "What's the weather?" [19:48] Agent: "It's sunny, 22°C" [19:49] User: "Cool, what about tomorrow?" [19:50] Agent: "It's sunny today at 22°C. Tomorrow will be cloudy, 18°C" ← Re-answered old question ``` ## Environment - Clawdbot version: 2026.1.7 - OS: macOS 26.2 - Install method: bun - Model provider - custom [OpenAI-compatible API endpoint for GitHub Copilot](https://github.com/ericc-ch/copilot-api) - Model - Claude 4.5 (Haiku, Sonnet & Opus all exhibit this problem). ## Logs or screenshots Example:
title: [Bug]: Agent re-answers previous messages after extended conversation
